evidence: skill survey: using omo:ulw-loop for durable criteria/evidence; omo:programming because frontend/backend edits will touch .tsx/.py; omo:frontend-ui-ux because this is a user-facing DOC feedback workflow; browser plugin because acceptance requires real DOC tab browser QA. Browser skill read fully; TypeScript programming reference read. Repo has no in-scope AGENTS.md. Existing relevant files include frontend/atlas/ssot-doc.tsx, workspace-root.tsx, workspace-orchestrator-chat.tsx, src/atlas_ui.py / src/atlas_api_ssot.py, src/atlas_ssot_export_html*.py, tests/test_ssot_export.py, tests/test_atlas_ssot_doc_tab.py. Some existing TSX files exceed 250 pure LOC; new code should be split into focused files where possible and only minimal bridge edits should touch large legacy files.
message: Bootstrap skill/context record before planning and implementation.

steering.evidence: skill survey: using omo:ulw-loop for durable criteria/evidence; omo:programming because frontend/backend edits will touch .tsx/.py; omo:frontend-ui-ux because this is a user-facing DOC feedback workflow; browser plugin because acceptance requires real DOC tab browser QA. Browser skill read fully; TypeScript programming reference read. Repo has no in-scope AGENTS.md. Existing relevant files include frontend/atlas/ssot-doc.tsx, workspace-root.tsx, workspace-orchestrator-chat.tsx, src/atlas_ui.py / src/atlas_api_ssot.py, src/atlas_ssot_export_html*.py, tests/test_ssot_export.py, tests/test_atlas_ssot_doc_tab.py. Some existing TSX files exceed 250 pure LOC; new code should be split into focused files where possible and only minimal bridge edits should touch large legacy files.
steering.rationale: Bootstrap skill/context record before planning and implementation.

goals.title: SSOT-GEN DOC tab Feedback Mode: add a user-facing feedback workflow w...
goals.objective: SSOT-GEN DOC tab Feedback Mode: add a user-facing feedback workflow where DOC rendered HTML components can be clicked or drag-selected to highlight; comments on a highlighted component are inserted into chat so the linked SSOT can be revised; the UI must expose which SSOT source/section a document fragment maps to through a Show SSOT button; reuse existing SSOT drag/drop or comment affordances where appropriate; build iteratively with RED->GREEN tests, real browser QA artifacts, cleanup receipts, and final reviewer approval.

goals.title: SSOT-GEN DOC tab Feedback Mode: add a user-facing feedback workflow w...
goals.objective: SSOT-GEN DOC tab Feedback Mode: add a user-facing feedback workflow where DOC rendered HTML components can be clicked or drag-selected to highlight; comments on a highlighted component are inserted into chat so the linked SSOT can be revised; the UI must expose which SSOT source/section a document fragment maps to through a Show SSOT button; reuse existing SSOT drag/drop or comment affordances where appropriate; build iteratively with RED->GREEN tests, real browser QA artifacts, cleanup receipts, and final reviewer approval.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: start Atlas on localhost:8765 with a fixture IP ssot_doc_feedback_demo, open /?backend=live&ip=ssot_doc_feedback_demo, enter SSOT-GEN DOC tab Feedback Mode, click a rendered DOC component with data-ssot-path, verify persistent highlight, click Show SSOT, verify source path/value snippet, type a comment, click Comment, verify chat composer is prefilled with SSOT edit prompt, then Apply Feedback and verify iframe refresh contains the feedback block.
